root.rep_text: รายงานการโอนหนี้ให้ผู้ค้ำ
root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_doc_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no) AS membername, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.last_access_date, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_status, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.principal_of_loan, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.period_payment, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.last_period, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_date, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.int_transfer_amount, ' ' as transfer_date_tdate, ' ' as last_access_date_tdate, ' ' as begining_of_contract_tdate, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.installment, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type , '!transfer_date_1!' as adtm_bdate, '!transfer_date_2!' as adtm_edate FROM sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.transfer_date between '01/06/2020' and '30/06/2020' ) order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_head.membership_no

r_ktm_trans_loan_to_coll_receive_nest_co.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.seq_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.collateral_no) AS coll_name, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.new_contract_no, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.loan_transfer_amount, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.period_payment, sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.start_keep_date FROM sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det WHERE sc_lon_m_trans_loan_coll_det.transfer_doc_no = {0}
